description: An atomic permission that can be granted directly to a user or via roles.

example.name: appointment
example.description: Access clerk view and manage appointments (create, edit, reschedule, cancel, including sending notification emails)

id.description: Numeric identifier of the permission (primary key in the permission table).

name.description: Unique name of the permission (e.g. appointment, scope, statistic, superuser).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the permission.
